nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 喬盧特卡省
nodes.summary: 喬盧特卡省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Hoffmann's woodpecker，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Hoffmann's woodpecker
nodes.summary: Hoffmann's woodpecker（Hoffmann's woodpecker，学名 Melanerpes hoffmannii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于喬盧特卡省，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Hoffmann's woodpecker is found from southwestern Honduras' Choluteca Department through Nicaragua on the Pacific slope to central Costa Rica. There is also one record from El Salvador. The species inhabits dry and deciduous forests and more open areas such as shade coffee plantations, urban parks, and house gardens

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It has "increased its distribution in recent years due in part to deforestation following growing human colonization" but "[e]limination of dead trees...negatively affects the population of this species, by limit[ing] the nesting substrates."
